title: cirsium × micranthum
intro: Cirsium × micranthum, also known as the thistle thistle or dwarf thistle, is a hybrid plant species within the Cirsium genus, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and thistle-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × micranthum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
